faqData.question: Can I bring a plus one?
faqData.answer: Kindly confirm to the couple first if there is an available extra seat.

faqData.question: Can I bring kids?
faqData.answer: As written in the invitation, the event is an Adult Affair Only. To give our guests the opportunity to let their hair down and have a good time without having to worry about little eyes and ears, we politely request no children.

faqData.question: Is there a dress code?
faqData.answer: Yes. Guests are encouraged to wear Light Blue or Light Pink attire to match the wedding motif.
